text:
Once upon a time, there was a shy boy named Oliver. Everyone thought he was boring. Oliver listened too much. One day Oliver heard a fascinating old record. It told a story about a brave squirrel who saved Christmas.

Oliver loved stories. They made him think.

That year, Oliver stayed silent. Every day he listened to that old record.

Christmas was finally upon them.

An unusual tree crashed through Oliver’s roof. It didnarda!

His parents didn’t notice.

A crowd gathered.

Children whispered.

Old ladies clucked.

However.

Oliver didn’t notice.

His tiny voice came.

Oliver told them.

Santa had fallen.


He’d crashed...

Ater flying through the forest.

A tree had lodged itself...

In his flight...

Anestelvesured??

They saved Santa...

Like heroes.

They flew down...

And handed Santa...

A tree.

Santa smiled.

Oliver’s ears perked.

They’d saved Christmas.

Oliver jumped!
